elements.title: Julius Prott
elements.contents: ... that international opera star Julius Prott (pictured) was also a horticulturalist who was acclaimed for his cultivation of roses?

elements.title: plateau vole
elements.contents: ... that the plateau vole handles hypoxia at high altitudes by producing more hemoglobin and metabolizing glucose?

elements.title: Aileen Allen
elements.contents: ... that Olympic diver and coach Aileen Allen was also an actress in silent films?

elements.title: a New York City warehouse
elements.contents: ... that a restaurant in a New York City warehouse converted a loading dock into a terrace?

elements.title: 2024 Chilean census
elements.contents: ... that the 2024 Chilean census was delayed twice by a total of nearly two years?

elements.title: Nathan Farb
elements.contents: ... that Nathan Farb carried his large-format 8×10 Deardorff view camera into the backcountry of the Adirondack Mountains to capture scenery far from the most-visited areas?

elements.title: O Menino e o Vento
elements.contents: ... that the Brazilian film O Menino e o Vento was rejected from the 1967 Venice Film Festival for being "old and unimportant" and "full of useless ideas"?

elements.title: his inauguration in 2019
elements.contents: ... that Ukrainian president Volodymyr Zelenskyy jumped to kiss his best friend on the head as he walked to his inauguration in 2019?

elements.title: Alan J. Southward
elements.contents: ... that marine ecologist Alan J. Southward almost never got sea-sick—because he was deaf?
